description: API de Godot Engine 4.6.1 para validación de GDScript

abs.description: Returns the absolute value of the parameter.

absf.description: Returns the absolute value of a float.

absi.description: Returns the absolute value of an integer.

acos.description: Returns the arc cosine of the parameter.

asin.description: Returns the arc sine of the parameter.

atan.description: Returns the arc tangent of the parameter.

atan2.description: Returns the arc tangent of y/x.

bytes_to_var.description: Converts a byte array back to a variable.

bytes_to_var_with_objects.description: Converts a byte array back to a variable including objects.

ceil.description: Returns the ceiling of the parameter.

clamp.description: Clamps the value between min and max.

cosh.description: Returns the hyperbolic cosine of the parameter.

cos.description: Returns the cosine of the parameter.

decimals.description: Returns the number of decimal places in the input.

dtoa.description: Converts a double to a string.

exp.description: Returns e raised to the given power.

floor.description: Returns the floor of the parameter.

fmod.description: Returns the floating-point remainder of x/y.

inst_to_dict.description: Converts an instance to a dictionary.

inst_to_dict2.description: Converts an instance to a dictionary.

is_instance_valid.description: Returns true if the instance is valid.

is_inf.description: Returns true if the value is infinity.

is_nan.description: Returns true if the value is NaN.

is_zero_approx.description: Returns true if the value is zero approximately.

max.description: Returns the maximum of two values.

min.description: Returns the minimum of two values.

move_toward.description: Moves the value towards the target.

ord.description: Returns the Unicode code point of a character.

pow.description: Returns the power of the base.

print_rich.description: Prints rich text to the console.

printerr.description: Prints an error to the console.

printraw.description: Prints raw output to the console.

range.description: Returns an array of integers from 0 to end.

rand_from_seed.description: Returns a random number from a seed.

rand_range.description: Returns a random float between from and to.

randf.description: Returns a random float between 0.0 and 1.0.

randi_range.description: Returns a random integer between from and to.

sign.description: Returns the sign of the value (-1, 0, 1).

signf.description: Returns the sign of a float.

signi.description: Returns the sign of an integer.

step_decimals.description: Returns the decimal part of a float.

stepify.description: Snaps the value to the given step.

str2var.description: Converts a string to a variable.

typeof.description: Returns the type of a variable.

valt.description: Converts a string to a value.

var_to_bytes_with_objects.description: Converts a variable to bytes with objects.

wrtov.description: Converts a string to a Variant.

decorators.deprecated_message: Consider using immediate property initialization instead of @onready

removed_in_godot4.yield: Use 'await' instead. Yield was removed in Godot 4.0.
removed_in_godot4.test_move: Use 'move_and_collide()' instead. test_move() was removed in Godot 4.0.
removed_in_godot4.rand_seed: Returns an array [value, seed]. Use RandomNumberGenerator instead.
removed_in_godot4.String.substr: Use String.substr() with adjusted behavior (returns characters from the right).
removed_in_godot4.rotation_degrees: Use rotation property with degrees editor (no longer separate).
removed_in_godot4.scene_parsed: Signal removed. Use SceneTree. SceneTree.tree_entered instead.
